test_cases.description: Ensures the system only includes users with location equal to Boone before generating the CSV.
test_cases.name: Fetch users, filter by Boone, and generate CSV

test_setup.given: API returns valid users and storage is writable. Some users have location Boone.
test_setup.then: A CSV file is created containing only Boone users with all fields preserved.

test_cases.description: Validates system behavior when API returns an empty array.
test_cases.name: Handle empty array response

test_setup.then: System signals an error and does not create or modify the CSV file.

test_cases.description: Ensures failure behavior when API responds with a non-200 status code.
test_cases.name: Error when API returns non-OK response

test_setup.given: HTTP GET request returns status 500 or 404.
test_setup.then: System throws an error and no CSV is created or modified.

test_cases.description: Ensures system handles JSON parsing errors safely.
test_cases.name: Error when API returns malformed JSON

test_setup.then: System throws an error and no CSV is created.

test_cases.description: Ensures CSV includes all fields exactly as present in the JSON object, and nested fields are stringified.
test_cases.name: Validate CSV field inclusion and stringification

test_setup.given: API returns valid user objects with nested fields.
test_setup.then: CSV headers match all fields and nested structures are stringified.

test_cases.description: Verifies that the system creates the data storage directory if missing.
test_cases.name: Auto-create directory before writing CSV

test_setup.then: Directory is created and CSV is written.
test_setup.when: main() is executed with valid data.

test_cases.description: Ensures system handles filesystem write permission errors.
test_cases.name: Error when unable to write CSV due to permissions

test_setup.given: Data directory exists but is not writable.
test_setup.then: System throws an error and no CSV is created.

test_cases.description: Validates performance and correctness with large API responses.
test_cases.name: Handle very large user array

test_setup.given: API returns a very large array of users.
test_setup.then: CSV is generated with all users and fields preserved.

test_cases.description: Ensures missing fields produce blank CSV cells but all fields across users are included.
test_cases.name: Handle missing fields across users

test_setup.given: API returns users missing some fields.
test_setup.then: CSV includes union of all fields and blank cells for missing ones.

test_cases.description: Ensures existing CSV remains unchanged on pre-parse failure.
test_cases.name: Do not modify CSV when API request fails

test_setup.given: Existing CSV file is present and API request fails before JSON parsing.
test_setup.then: CSV remains unchanged.

test_cases.description: Validates overwrite behavior when CSV already exists.
test_cases.name: Overwrite old CSV on success

test_setup.given: Old CSV exists and API returns valid data.
test_setup.then: Old CSV is overwritten with new content.

test_cases.description: Ensures CSV contains a union of differing schema fields.
test_cases.name: Handle differing user fields

test_setup.given: API returns users with inconsistent field sets.
test_setup.then: CSV includes all unique fields and blanks for missing ones.

test_cases.description: Ensures timeout behaves like other failed requests.
test_cases.name: Do not create CSV on network timeout

test_setup.then: System errors and no CSV is created or modified.

test_cases.description: Validates success logging after CSV write.
test_cases.name: Ensure success log entry is written

test_setup.then: Success log entry is created.

test_cases.description: Ensures system errors when no users match Boone filter.
test_cases.name: No Boone users found

test_setup.given: API returns valid users but none have location Boone.
test_setup.then: System signals an error and no CSV is created.

test_cases.description: Validates behavior when user objects are missing required base fields such as id or name.
test_cases.name: Malformed user object structure

test_setup.given: API returns user objects missing mandatory fields.
test_setup.then: System errors and no CSV is generated.

test_cases.description: Ensures that a normal User object is converted into a CSV-safe row with all expected fields.
test_cases.name: Convert valid user object to CSV row

test_cases.description: Ensures commas inside string values are escaped properly for CSV formatting.
test_cases.name: Escape CSV fields containing commas

test_cases.description: Ensures quotes inside fields are escaped correctly.
test_cases.name: Escape CSV fields containing quotes

test_cases.description: Ensures missing optional fields still produce valid CSV output.
test_cases.name: Handle missing optional fields

test_cases.description: Ensures null values are converted into empty strings.
test_cases.name: Convert null values to CSV-safe empty fields

test_cases.description: Ensures empty user object results in an empty CSV row since there are no fields to serialize.
test_cases.name: Empty user object produces no fields

test_cases.description: Ensures incorrect types are stringified safely.
test_cases.name: Invalid field types

test_cases.description: Ensures nested structures are included intact in CSV as JSON.
test_cases.name: Deeply nested objects are preserved as JSON strings

test_cases.description: Ensures function consistently returns fields in the expected order.
test_cases.name: Only required fields are extracted in correct order

test_cases.description: Ensures function includes unexpected additional fields when present.
test_cases.name: Handle additional top-level JSON fields automatically

test_cases.description: Ensures undefined fields are output as empty CSV fields.
test_cases.name: Handle undefined field values

test_cases.description: Ensures newline characters are escaped correctly for CSV safety.
test_cases.name: Handle user fields containing newline characters

test_cases.description: Value without commas, quotes, or newlines should be returned unchanged.
test_cases.name: No special characters

test_setup.then: helloWorld

test_cases.description: Value containing commas should be wrapped in quotes.
test_cases.name: Value containing a comma

test_setup.then: "hello,world"

test_cases.description: Value containing quotes should be quoted and internal quotes doubled.
test_cases.name: Value containing quote characters

test_setup.then: "hello""world"

test_cases.description: Value containing newline should be wrapped in quotes.
test_cases.name: Value containing newline

test_setup.then:
"hello
world"

test_cases.description: Value containing commas, quotes, and newlines should be wrapped in quotes and internal quotes doubled.
test_cases.name: Multiple special characters

test_setup.then: ""hello,\nwo""rld"""

test_cases.description: Empty string should return empty string without quoting.
test_cases.name: Empty string returns empty string

test_cases.description: Value containing only quotes should be quoted and internal quotes doubled.
test_cases.name: Only quotes

test_cases.description: String containing only commas should be wrapped in quotes.
test_cases.name: Only commas

test_cases.description: Non‑string values should be converted to string.
test_cases.name: Integer input

test_cases.description: Null should return empty string.
test_cases.name: Null converts to empty string

test_cases.description: Undefined should return empty string.
test_cases.name: Undefined converts to empty string

test_cases.description: Unicode characters should not trigger quoting unless they contain special characters.
test_cases.name: Unicode allowed

test_setup.then: こんにちは

test_cases.description: Carriage return should trigger wrapping in quotes.
test_cases.name: Carriage return triggers quoting

test_setup.then: "helloworld"

test_cases.description: Leading or trailing spaces alone should not trigger quoting.
test_cases.name: Leading/trailing spaces

test_setup.then: spaced value

test_cases.description: Tab characters should not trigger quoting.
test_cases.name: Tab inside string

test_setup.then: hello	world

test_cases.description: Boolean values should be converted to strings.
test_cases.name: Boolean input

test_setup.then: true

test_cases.description: Semicolon should not trigger quoting.
test_cases.name: String containing semicolon

test_setup.then: hello;world

test_cases.description: Whitespace mixing should not trigger quoting unless CSV special characters are present.
test_cases.name: String with mixed whitespace but no special CSV chars

test_setup.then: hello 	 world

test_cases.description: Long strings should be returned unchanged unless special characters are included.
test_cases.name: Very long string without special chars

test_setup.then: T.repeat(5000)

test_cases.description: Long strings containing commas must still be quoted.
test_cases.name: Very long string with commas

test_cases.description: Verify that the static index.html file renders without errors.
test_cases.name: renders_static_html_successfully

test_setup.then: The static HTML content is displayed with no missing elements or render failures.
test_setup.when: The user loads the root URL in the browser.

test_cases.description: Ensure index.html does not trigger any API requests, including JSONPlaceholder or backend routes.
test_cases.name: does_not_initiate_api_requests

test_setup.given: The index.html file contains no scripts initiating fetch or AJAX calls.
test_setup.then: No HTTP GET requests to any backend or JSONPlaceholder endpoints are triggered.
test_setup.when: The page loads in the browser.

test_cases.description: Verify the page contains no UI elements that perform actions related to user-fetch or CSV creation.
test_cases.name: no_interactive_elements_trigger_actions

test_setup.given: Static HTML content with no buttons, forms, or interactive scripts.
test_setup.then: No actions occur because no interactive logic is present.
test_setup.when: The user attempts to interact with visible UI.

test_cases.description: Ensure that interactions do not change any client‑side or server‑side state since the page is static.
test_cases.name: no_state_or_dom_changes_on_interaction

test_setup.given: Static HTML page with no stateful components or scripts.
test_setup.then: No DOM or application state changes occur.
test_setup.when: A user clicks or interacts with any text or element.

test_cases.description: Confirm that loading index.html does not cause CSV generation, filtering, or persistence operations.
test_cases.name: does_not_trigger_backend_csv_generation_flow

test_setup.given: A backend capable of user-fetch, filtering by 'Boone', and CSV creation.
test_setup.then: No backend endpoints related to user-fetch or CSV processing are triggered.

test_cases.description: Verify behavior when index.html is missing or inaccessible.
test_cases.name: handles_missing_index_html_file

test_setup.given: index.html is removed or has invalid permissions.
test_setup.then: Server returns an HTTP 404 or 500 error and no UI content is displayed.
test_setup.when: The user navigates to the root URL.

test_cases.description: Ensure the served HTML is unchanged and not modified by runtime logic.
test_cases.name: displays_static_content_exactly_as_written

test_setup.then: The rendered content matches the source exactly with no injected dynamic elements.

test_cases.description: Verify that no inline or external JavaScript is included that could trigger backend flows.
test_cases.name: no_inline_or_external_scripts_present

test_setup.then: The document contains no <script> tags of any kind.

test_cases.description: Verify index.html is served with correct MIME type.
test_cases.name: served_with_correct_content_type

test_setup.then: The response Content-Type header is 'text/html'.

test_cases.description: Verify server behavior when index.html becomes syntactically malformed.
test_cases.name: handles_malformed_html_gracefully

test_setup.given: index.html contains broken or malformed markup.
test_setup.then: Browser renders partial content but server still serves the file without backend processing.

test_cases.description: Ensure index.html does not load dynamic assets such as JSON, XML, CSV, or dynamic HTML fragments.
test_cases.name: forbids_any_dynamic_asset_loading

test_setup.given: Static HTML with no dynamic inclusion.
test_setup.then: No secondary resource requests occur except CSS or images.

test_cases.description: Verify index.html does not initiate filtering of user data based on 'Boone'.
test_cases.name: does_not_trigger_user_filtering_logic

test_setup.then: No filtering or data transformation logic executes.

test_cases.description: Ensures API returns JSON parsed from existing users.csv
test_cases.name: Retrieve users when CSV exists

test_setup.given: users.csv exists with valid CSV content
test_setup.then: Server reads CSV, converts to JSON, and returns parsed result

test_cases.description: Checks error handling when users.csv is missing
test_cases.name: Return 404 when CSV file does not exist

test_setup.given: users.csv does not exist on disk
test_setup.then: Server returns 404 with error message

test_cases.description: Ensures system handles an empty CSV file gracefully
test_cases.name: Handle empty CSV file

test_setup.given: users.csv exists but contains only headers
test_setup.then: Server returns an empty array

test_cases.description: Ensures API handles parsing errors from invalid CSV
test_cases.name: Handle malformed CSV content

test_setup.given: users.csv exists but contains malformed or corrupt data
test_setup.then: Server returns a 500 error

test_cases.description: Ensures API handles large datasets without performance issues
test_cases.name: Retrieve users from large CSV file

test_setup.then: Server returns full parsed JSON dataset

test_cases.description: Confirms CSV storage rule that filters users by location Boone before saving
test_cases.name: Ensure CSV includes only users with location Boone

test_setup.given: users.csv contains only users whose city equals Boone
test_setup.then: System returns only Boone users in JSON format

test_cases.description: Ensures API handles file-read permission errors
test_cases.name: Fail when server lacks file read permission

test_setup.given: users.csv exists but server cannot read due to permission restrictions
test_setup.then: Server responds with 500 permission error

test_cases.description: Confirms endpoint does not rely on client headers for operation
test_cases.name: Ignore irrelevant request headers

test_setup.then: Server still returns parsed JSON and ignores header issues
test_setup.when: GET request is made with irrelevant or incorrect headers
